crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"ET MALWARE CryptoWall Check-in"; flow:established,to_server; urilen:<134; http.uri; pcre:"/[\/=][a-z0-9]{8,}$/"; http.user_agent; content:"|20|MSIE|20|"; fast_pattern; http.request_body; content:"="; offset:1; depth:1; pcre:"/^[a-z]=[a-f0-9]{80,}$/"; http.accept; content:"*/*"; depth:3; endswith; http.content_type; content:"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"; depth:33; endswith; http.header_names; content:"|0d 0a|Accept|0d 0a|Content-Type|0d 0a|"; depth:24; content:!"Accept-"; nocase; content:!"Referer"; reference:md5,3c53c9f7ab32a09de89bb44e5f91f9af; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:2018452; rev:18; metadata:created_at 2014_05_05, updated_at 2020_09_17;)
